ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the property */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the property is located */,
  "property_type" INTEGER /* Type of property (referenced from property_types) */,
  "property_size" INTEGER /* Size of the property (referenced from property_sizes) */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., available, sold, pending) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the last sale */,
  "last_sale_price" REAL /* Price of the last sale */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed for sale */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the property */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type FOREIGN KEY ("property_type") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_size FOREIGN KEY ("property_size") REFERENCES property_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the sale */,
  "full_market_price" INTEGER /* Whether the sale was at full market price */,
  "vat_exclusive" INTEGER /* Whether the sale was VAT-exclusive */,
  "sale_status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the sale */,
  "commission_amount" REAL /* Commission amount earned */,
  "sale_description" TEXT /* Description of the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount paid on the sale */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was closed */,
  "closing_documents" TEXT /* File path to closing documents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales agent */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the sales agent */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the sales agent was hired */,
  "date_terminated" TEXT /* Date the sales agent was terminated */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the sales agent */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales made by the agent */,
  "total_commission_earned" REAL /* Total commission earned by the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokers" (
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broker */,
  "broker_name" TEXT /* Name of the broker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the broker */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the broker */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the broker */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the broker was hired */,
  "date_terminated" TEXT /* Date the broker was terminated */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the broker */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales managed by the broker */,
  "total_commission_earned" REAL /* Total commission earned by the broker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sale_agents_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales agent */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the sales agent in the sale (e.g., lead agent, supporting agent) */,
  "commission_split" REAL /* Percentage of commission split between agents */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date the agent was assigned to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id", "agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sale_brokers" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the broker in the sale (e.g., lead broker, supporting broker) */,
  "commission_split" REAL /* Percentage of commission split between brokers */,
  "date_assigned" TEXT /* Date the broker was assigned to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id", "broker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "is_residential" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the property type is residential */,
  "is_commercial" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the property type is commercial */,
  "average_size" REAL /* Average size of properties of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the property size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property size */,
  "min_size" REAL /* Minimum size of the property range */,
  "max_size" REAL /* Maximum size of the property range */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties in this size range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales agent, broker, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the document is related to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., sale contract, property deed) */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_documents_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sale_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale the document is related to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., sale contract, invoice) */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sale_documents_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)
